text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Bono! Happy birthday to you! I'm turning this
whole day into a party for you!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Think of it as thanks for always making amazing
food for me!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Vanquishing evil requires the power of justice!
The food you make is full of nutrition, so it's
perfect for refueling!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
You mean it? I'm so happy! I'll have to make lots
and lots of food today!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
If you need power, I know just the thing! Chanko
hot pot with a huuuge helping of grilled meat!
Plus...

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Why does it feel like we're celebrating my
birthday instead of yours?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Don't sweat it! As long as you keep eating my
food, I'm sure that world peace will be just around
the corner.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
World peace through eating lots of food... Does
that mean I have to eat celery too?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: It's for the sake of the world!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Ngh! This won't stop me. After all, a hero can't
choose her battles.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Oooh! And just like that, we're one step closer to
world peace! ☆
